title: aphora calyptrata
intro: Aphora calyptrata is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the Calyptrid Aphora or the Umbellate Aphora. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aphora calyptrata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
